summary: Comprehensive pipeline report for the Top/List Review mode with the Bí Ẩn Lịch Sử (Historical Mystery) niche. Covers: niche config parameters, 12-step pipeline flow with mermaid diagram, Macro Tone Arc (sine wave), 7 chapter structures, 4 closing types, 12-dimension cross-chapter quality review, writer rules/constraints, 4 storytelling methods, and key rewriter.py function references.
